posts.text:
You get what you deserve.

Your policies are radical.
Your taxes are unbearable.
Your leadership is tyrannical.

You even told New Yorkers to “head down to Florida where you belong.”

As Governor, the Free State of Florida will continue to lead with unapologetic conservatism.


Libs of TikTok (@libsoftiktok)

Gov. Kathy Hochul (D) complains that wealthy people are ABANDONING New York for Republican states like Florida and Texas to avoid oppressive taxes that fund her "generous" social programs

posts.text:
The Cuban Regime is a brutal, murderous, Communist dictatorship that has destroyed the liberty of the Cuban people for generations.

It is a national security threat just 90 mi away that has terrorized the families of nearly 1.6M Floridians for nearly 70 yrs.

The Regime must go.

FACT: 83% of Americans support voter-ID.

FACT: 79% of Americans oppose men in women’s sports.

FACT: 72% of Americans oppose transgender surgeries for minors.

This is @Eric_Schmitt’s Amendment to the “Save America Act.”

This is widely popular & common sense.

This should pass.

posts.text:
Florida has grown incredibly fast over the past 6 years.

Our infrastructure needs to catch-up.

Under my leadership, we will implement regional planning across our state to increase efficiency, expedite permitting, complete much-needed infrastructure projects and reduce traffic.

Video

posts.text:
You cannot negotiate with crazy & that’s exactly what the Democrats have become.

The Democrats need to get real—defunding critical national security & disaster relief is not some political game or campaign slogan.

The Senate must put the AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST & FUND @DHSgov.

posts.text:
I’m a FREE SPEECH ABSOLUTIST.

If you want to be an asshat—you’re allowed to be an asshat, and I’ll protect your right to be one.

If you want to be ignorant—you’re allowed to be ignorant, and I’ll protect your right to be ignorant.

This is the very essence of Constitutionalism.

Video

posts.text:
There is right and there is wrong.

Will we stand-up and oppose the rise of bigotry and anti-Semitism in our country?

MY ANSWER IS CLEAR: 100% YES.

This is about standing-up to ignorance.
This is about establishing moral clarity.
This is about real leadership.

Video

posts.text:
Florida has been on one of the hottest 30 year runs of any state in the nation, and the last 7 years have been epic.

We CANNOT rest on our laurels.

With unapologetic conservatism, we’ll continue to lead the way, build upon our successes, and plan for Florida’s next 30 year run.

We cannot let up until every political prisoner is free and the Cuban people live in liberty.
